g.text: M1 | hash-impl-m1 | Message Preprocessing and Padding
M4 | hash-impl-m4 | Final Hash Output and Validation
bitwise MUX: x=1->y x=0->z | nonlinear AND
majority gate: out=1 iff 2+ inputs=1 | nonlinear
MUST copy fresh per hash | never share mutable ref
stack-alloc OK for learning impl | heap for prod
Length field = bits NOT bytes | cast (uint64_t)len*8
caller must declare uint32_t W[64] — no alloc
h=g; g=f; f=e; e=d+T1 | NOT d+T1+T2
d=c; c=b; b=a; a=T1+T2 | BOTH temps
T1 T2 computed BEFORE any assignment | RAW safe
a=H[0]..h=H[7] | copy state to working vars
for t=0..63: T1 T2 then rotate | 64 rounds
W[64]=256B + a..h T1 T2=40B = 296B total frame
prior state baked in | attacker cant override
same pattern as Davies-Meyer block cipher construct
uint32_t H[8] | 32 bytes | running hash state
uint8_t buf[64] | 64 bytes | partial block buffer
size_t buf_len | 8 bytes | valid bytes in buf [0..63]
uint64_t total_bits | 8 bytes | cumulative bit count
buf_len NEVER==64 | full block always flushed
Total: ~112 bytes | 2 cache lines on x86-64
if buf_len>0: fill+flush if complete | partial: return
write total_bits BE at buf[56..63] | NOT buf_len*8
sha256_init before outer hash | reset required
